findings.description: Sender details are duplicated.
findings.evidence: The text block containing sender details ('ROY COOPER...') appears twice in side-by-side columns in the HTML.

findings.description: Erroneous embedded image of page text.
findings.evidence: A large image containing the text from 'Certified Mail' down to the signature is embedded, duplicating the HTML text.

findings.description: Erroneous embedded image of page text.
findings.evidence: An image containing the top half of the email thread is embedded, duplicating the HTML text.

findings.description: Complete duplication of page text.
findings.evidence: The HTML displays the full email thread text twice, above and below an embedded image.

findings.description: Erroneous embedded image of page text.
findings.evidence: A full-page screenshot of the text is embedded.

findings.description: Complete duplication of page text.
findings.evidence: The HTML displays the full numbered list text twice.

findings.evidence: A full-page screenshot of the text is embedded.

findings.description: Footer text duplicated.
findings.evidence: The legal disclaimer footer is duplicated below the embedded image.

findings.evidence: A full-page screenshot of the text is embedded.

findings.description: Text from the next page is erroneously included.
findings.evidence: The bottom of the HTML page contains text starting with '2. If the maximum explosive weight...', which logically belongs to Page 11.

findings.description: Text duplication.
findings.evidence: The heading text 'EXHIBITS 1A. AND 1B.' is duplicated in the HTML.
